marketName: Fluid Power Cylinder and Actuator Manufacturing

alternatives.name: Cold-drawn precision round bar (C45 / 42CrMo4) — ZOLLERN
alternatives.tradeoffs: Min batch ~100 kg; 6-12 week tooling lead for new OD; max OD ~56 mm for cold-draw; IT8 tolerance +-0.02 mm; in-line IH up to 64 HRC; EN 10204 3.1 standard; IATF 16949 [SRC: JTBD_hydraulic_cylinders]

alternatives.name: Precision-turned + OD-ground bar from hot-rolled stock
alternatives.tradeoffs: 20-30% more material waste; additional turning operation; hot-rolled tolerance +-0.5 mm requires heavier grinding stock [SRC: JTBD_hydraulic_cylinders]

alternatives.name: Forged rod blank (large-diameter, heavy-duty)
alternatives.tradeoffs: High tooling cost; min batch ~500 kg; 8-16 week lead time; not suited for OD < ~80 mm [SRC: JTBD_hydraulic_cylinders]

alternatives.name: Pre-ground commercial piston rod stock (e.g. Ovako Cromax)
alternatives.tradeoffs: ISO f7 OD; Ra <0.2 um; limited to standard ODs in 5 mm steps; limited alloy range — mostly C45; no 42CrMo4 IH coupling; zero tooling risk [SRC: ADJ_hydraulic_cylinders]

alternatives.name: Do nothing / outsource to contract rod bar processor
alternatives.tradeoffs: Zero in-house metallurgical control; extended supply chain; quality traceability risk; zero P1 burden on internal engineering team
